heading: Notice and damage assessment with respect to significant unauthorized disclosure or compromise of classified national intelligence
label: 3235a Notice and damage assessment with respect to significant unauthorized disclosure or compromise of classified national intelligence

children.heading: Notification and damage assessment requirements
children.label: a Notification and damage assessment requirements
A
children.text: as soon as practicable, but not later than 7 days after the date on which the Director becomes so aware, the Director shall notify the congressional intelligence committees of such actual or potential disclosure or compromise; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of an actual disclosure or compromise, not later than 7 days after the date on which the Director becomes so aware, the Director or the head of any element of the intelligence community from which the significant unauthorized disclosure or compromise originated shall initiate a damage assessment consistent with the procedures set forth in Intelligence Community Directive 732 (relating to the conduct of damage assessments), or successor directive, with respect to such disclosure or compromise.

children.label: A
children.text: a summary of the facts and circumstances of such disclosure or compromise;

children.label: B
children.text: a summary of the contents of the national intelligence revealed or potentially revealed, as the case may be, by such disclosure or compromise;

children.label: C
children.text: an initial appraisal of the level of actual or potential damage, as the case may be, to the national security of the United States as a result of such disclosure or compromise; and

children.label: D
children.text: in the case of an actual disclosure or compromise, which elements of the intelligence community will be involved in the damage assessment conducted with respect to such disclosure or compromise pursuant to paragraph (1)(B).

children.label: A
children.text: submit to the congressional intelligence committees copies of any documents or materials disclosed as a result of the significant unauthorized disclosure or compromise of the classified national intelligence that is the subject of the damage assessment; and

children.label: B
children.text: provide to the congressional intelligence committees a briefing on such documents and materials and a status of the damage assessment.

children.heading: Final damage assessment
children.label: 2 Final damage assessment
children.text: As soon as practicable after completing a damage assessment pursuant to subsection (a)(1)(B), the Director of National Intelligence shall submit the final damage assessment to the congressional intelligence committees.

children.heading: Notification of referral to Department of Justice
children.label: c Notification of referral to Department of Justice
children.text: If a referral is made to the Department of Justice from any element of the intelligence community regarding a significant unauthorized disclosure or compromise of classified national intelligence under this section, the Director of National Intelligence shall notify the congressional intelligence committees of the referral on the date such referral is made.
